channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (far_out)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Meghan Trainor @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-08-09 01:30 — Meghan Trainor at Chase Center. Meghan Trainor's pop appeal and strong live performances make this a noteworthy event.

item.title: ZAYN @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-09-03 03:00 — ZAYN at Chase Center. ZAYN's return to the stage with a new tour is generating significant buzz.

item.title: RUSH @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-10-18 02:30 — RUSH at SAP Center at San Jose. Bob Moses is known for their captivating live shows, making this a must-see.

item.title: Rainbow Kitten Surprise @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-19 03:00 — Rainbow Kitten Surprise at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Rainbow Kitten Surprise has a strong reputation for energetic and engaging performances.

item.title: Tedeschi Trucks Band @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-08-13 01:00 — Tedeschi Trucks Band at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Tedeschi Trucks Band is celebrated for their exceptional live musicianship.

item.title: Jack Johnson @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-10-01 01:30 → 2026-10-02 01:30 — Jack Johnson at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Jack Johnson's laid-back vibe and strong fanbase make this show appealing.

item.title: Hilary Duff @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-07-12 02:00 — Hilary Duff at Shoreline Amphitheatre. Hilary Duff's return to touring is generating nostalgia and excitement among fans.

item.title: Evanescence @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-07-21 02:00 — Evanescence at Shoreline Amphitheatre. Evanescence's tour with Spiritbox and Nova Twins offers a compelling lineup.

item.title: John Mellencamp @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-08-13 03:00 — John Mellencamp at Shoreline Amphitheatre. A$AP Rocky's tour is highly anticipated, promising a vibrant show.

item.title: O.A.R. @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-08-13 01:30 — O.A.R. at The Masonic. O.A.R.'s three decades of music will resonate well with long-time fans.

item.title: Childish Gambino @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-09-09 03:00 — Childish Gambino at Chase Center. Childish Gambino's tour is expected to be a standout event with strong artistic vision.

item.title: The Neighbourhood @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-10-08 02:30 — The Neighbourhood at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. The Neighbourhood's tour is generating excitement with their latest music.

item.title: The Lemon Twigs @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-06-18 03:00 — The Lemon Twigs at The Fillmore. The Lemon Twigs are known for their eclectic sound and engaging live shows.

item.title: Courtney Barnett @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-08-27 03:00 — Courtney Barnett at The Fillmore. Courtney Barnett's unique storytelling and live energy make her shows special.

item.title: Bilmuri @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-10-05 02:00 — Bilmuri at The Masonic. Bilmuri's unique sound and growing fanbase make this an interesting pick.

item.title: The Growlers @ The Castro Theatre
item.description: 2026-09-19 03:00 — The Growlers at The Castro Theatre. Iron & Wine's intimate performances are always a treat for fans.

item.title: Diljit Dosanjh @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-06-22 03:00 — Diljit Dosanjh at Chase Center. Diljit Dosanjh's tour promises a vibrant cultural experience.
